properties.entry: INSERT INTO FRUIT_BOARD ( CONSUMER_NO , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT ) VALUES ( ? , ? , ? )
SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , CONSUMER_ID FROM FRUIT_BOARD JOIN CONSUMER USING(CONSUMER_NO)
SELECT BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , WRITEN_DATE FROM FRUIT_BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = ?
SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , CONSUMER_ID FROM FRUIT_BOARD F , CONSUMER C WHERE C.CONSUMER_NO = ? AND C.CONSUMER_NO = F.CONSUMER_NO
